manifest.name: Chinese Punctuation Converter

name: Chinese Punctuation Converter

releases.author: Enthusjast
releases.description:
# 1.0.3

## New Features

- **i18n support** — UI language can be set to Auto (follow Obsidian), Chinese, or English. All commands, notices, settings, and context menu entries are translated.
- **Ignore code blocks** — Optionally skip punctuation conversion inside fenced code blocks and inline code.
- **Ignore math regions** — Optionally skip conversion inside `$...$` and `$$...$$` math expressions.
- **Ignore frontmatter** — Optionally skip conversion inside YAML frontmatter blocks.
- **Status bar indicator** — A clickable status bar item shows the current toggle state and allows quick enable/disable with a single click.

## Improvements

- **Diff-based editor monitoring** — Only the changed text region is analyzed and replaced on each tick instead of the full document, improving performance and preserving cursor position.
- **Settings tab redesign** — Language selector, ignore region toggles, and fully translated setting labels.
- **README overhaul** — Added installation guide (Community Plugins & BRAT), development setup, project structure, and corrected conversion table.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed cursor position not being restored after punctuation replacement.
- Fixed several type errors and lint warnings.

releases.author: Enthusjast
releases.description:
## What's Changed

  ### Core improvement: diff-based replacement
  - The plugin no longer converts punctuation across the entire document on every keystroke. A bidirectional diff now
  identifies only the newly typed region and transforms that portion alone, preserving existing content intact.

  ### New features
  - **Ribbon icon**: Added a sidebar button to convert the entire active file with one click.
  - **Context menu**: Right-click on selected text to convert only the selected punctuation.
  - **Custom rules**: You can now add, delete, and toggle individual punctuation conversion rules in the settings tab.

  ### Bug fixes
  - Fixed default rule mappings: `、` now converts to `,` (was `\`) and `·` to `.` (was `` ` ``), avoiding unintended
  Markdown escape sequences and inline code formatting.
  - Fixed cursor position drift after converting multi-byte Chinese characters to single-byte English equivalents.
  - Removed redundant `includes()` checks before `replaceAll()` calls.

  ### Maintenance
  - Dropped deprecated `baseUrl` and replaced `moduleResolution: "node"` with `"bundler"` in tsconfig to resolve
  TypeScript 7.0 deprecation warnings.
